Fig 1People swimming in the pools

Leisure enhancing formulas

Sunscreens that take leisure as seriously as they do protection. Designed to make the wearer, look, feel and smell like they’ve been to paradise and back.

World’s best-smelling scents

Our signature sunscreen scent was developed in conjunction with the much celebrated ARQUISTE Parfumeur. It immerses the wearer in a nostalgic mix of coconut, banana, pool water, pool toy and swimsuit fabric for optimal poolside lounging.

Fig. 2Oh shiny products in the backdrop sky
Fig. 3

Hawaii Act 104 Compliant & Dermatologist Tested

Formulas developed in line with the Hawaii Act 104 Compliant and in conjunction with Dr. Elizabeth Hale, Board Certified Dermatologist & Chief Medical Advisor to the Vacation® brand.

Fig. 4

Sunscreen with its own radio station

Vacation® brand sunscreens come standard with Poolsuite FM and other leisure-enhancing amenities conveniently accessed by QR codes on product packaging.

Words of Wisdom from true Leisure Connoisseurs
It’s pure summertime euphoria in a bottle
It’ll make you feel like you’re on a getaway in the golden age of travel in the best way
Vacation created a time machine and disguised it as a bottle of sunscreen lotion.
Debatably the most exciting sunscreen to hit the market since Anthelios finally arrived stateside 15 years ago
Vacation has earned its place as my signature summer scent, and that’s kind of a big deal.
This might actually be the world's best-smelling sunscreen
Smells better than any sunscreen I’ve tried
Effective as it is chic

Show the World That You Mean Business.

Claim your honorary role at Vacation® to receive insider perks.

  • Staff only merch
  • Preferential treatment at Poolsuite FM and Vacation® Events
  • Earn exclusive items
  • Career boosting title for your LinkedIn
  • Impressive eggshell (virtual) business card with Garamond typeface

Leisure-Enhancing Sunscreen

“Excessively Good” and “Leisure-Enhancing” sunscreen for those who demand the best from life.
